title: rubus × hariacus
intro: Rubus × hariacus is a hybrid plant that belongs to the rose family and is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the Himalayan raspberry (Rubus ellipticus). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of antioxidants, which can help protect against cell damage and inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus × hariacus include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve cognitive function, and support the immune system. Rubus × hariacus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
